_note: ONE setup file for the whole project. Copy to config.json (gitignored) and fill in. The device firmware reads wifi + proxy.url/token + device.* at build time; the proxy (on your Pi) reads proxy.token/session_key/poll_seconds. Device runtime settings can also be changed live via PUT /config.json on the device.

proxy._auth_note: PREFERRED: install Claude Code, run `claude` + sign in, then `node proxy/get_token.js` — it fills proxy.oauth_token below (an auto-refreshing token, no recurring chore). FALLBACK: paste a claude.ai session_key cookie instead (expires every few days).
